# Praxic Docs

Customer-facing documentation for Praxic, Basepoint's AI employee platform.

## Core pages

- /: Praxic documentation home and task entry points.
- /getting-started/quickstart: Build your first AI employee, add knowledge, connect tools, and test the result.
- /concepts/core-concepts: Workspaces, AI employees, knowledge, tools, workflows, channels, inbox, and credits.

## Build

- /build/ai-employees: Create and configure saved AI employees.
- /build/knowledge-bases: Add text, URL, and file knowledge sources.
- /build/skills: Reusable instructions and tool bundles for employees.
- /build/workflows: Automations with triggers, employee steps, tool steps, and run history.

## Integrations and channels

- /integrations/overview: Native integrations, OAuth, API keys, and tool permissions.
- /integrations/composio: Long-tail Composio toolkits and toolkit connection flows.
- /channels/telegram: Connect Telegram and control allowed senders.

## Operations

- /inbox/handoffs-bookings-tasks: Tasks, human handoffs, bookings, content drafts, and lead research.
- /operations/activity-and-notifications: Workspace activity feed and actionable notifications.
- /billing/credits-and-plans: Plans, credit balance, top-ups, portal, and auto-recharge.
- /troubleshooting/common-issues: Common setup, integration, knowledge, workflow, and billing issues.

## API reference

- /api-reference/authentication: Cookie session auth, active workspace scoping, and public webhook exceptions.
- /api-reference/endpoints: Customer-facing endpoint summary.
- /api-reference/models-and-tools: Model catalog, native tools, Composio tools, and permission model.
- /api-reference/workflow-reference: Workflow triggers, node types, run states, templates, and webhooks.
